name: taiwanmd
description: Free, no-API-key, local-first Taiwan knowledge for your AI — 900+ curated, citation-backed articles.
long_description: Taiwan.md is an open-source, AI-native knowledge base about Taiwan. This connector exposes it as MCP tools so Claude can search, read, and cite verified, source-backed articles about Taiwan instead of guessing. No API key. No account. No billing. Queries run against a local knowledge base (auto-synced to ~/.taiwanmd on first use) — nothing leaves your machine. The taiwanmd_cite tool only returns claims that carry a real footnote and source URL, making it an anti-hallucination primitive for anything you write about Taiwan. CC BY-SA 4.0 content, MIT code.

tools.name: taiwanmd_search
tools.description: Full-text search across 900+ curated articles about Taiwan (Chinese or English).

tools.name: taiwanmd_read
tools.description: Read the full body of a Taiwan.md article by slug.

tools.name: taiwanmd_rag
tools.description: Retrieve top-N articles as a prompt-ready RAG context block before answering.

tools.name: taiwanmd_cite
tools.description: Anti-hallucination: return only claims with a real footnote + source URL.

tools.name: taiwanmd_stats
tools.description: Project summary stats: article count, categories, timestamps.
